## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

Fixes #

## Type of Change

- [ ] Content update
- [ ] Tool directory update
- [ ] Exam/question update
- [ ] Game or interactive feature
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Chore or infrastructure

## Scope

- [ ] Learn
- [ ] Tools
- [ ] Games
- [ ] Exams
- [ ] Newsletter
- [ ] Community / GitHub setup
- [ ] Site infrastructure

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] Screenshots attached for visual UI changes
- [ ] Content uses explicit slugs and follows `lib/content.ts` types

## Reviewer Notes

Add anything reviewers should pay close attention to, including open questions,
known follow-ups, or areas where you want extra feedback.
